goals.title: Integrate Memory-Driven Decision Making
goals.description: Enable the agent to automatically query past decisions, apply learned patterns, and reuse solutions from previous projects. Build context pre-fetching, fact-based routing, and pattern detection so the agent makes smarter decisions on the second and third iteration of similar tasks.

goals.title: Build Active Self-Learning Loop
goals.description: Implement automated failure analysis, rule generation, and effectiveness scoring. The agent should learn from every task execution, classify failures, propose improvement rules, and track which tools/patterns work best. Weekly self-improvement proposals for review.

goals.title: Create Domain-Specific Project Scaffolds
goals.description: Build 5-6 reusable project templates: AI/ML research, SaaS startup, data analysis, CLI tools, web automation. Each scaffold should include pre-configured dependencies, test frameworks, documentation templates, and GitHub setup. Remove friction from project initialization.

goals.title: Implement Intelligent Time-Constraint Aware Planner
goals.description: Build a scheduler that understands your evening/weekend availability, breaks long tasks into 90-min focused sessions, estimates effort based on historical data, and automatically distributes work across your free time. Should enable resuming with full context preservation.

goals.title: Prepare Local-Only Deployment Infrastructure
goals.description: Build a roadmap and tooling to run the entire agent stack locally (qwen3:70b or similar) on a dedicated machine. Include: GPU/NPU optimization, model quantization, local vectorDB scaling, offline web access, and cost-per-inference tracking for when you upgrade hardware.

goals.title: Set Up Income Generation Pipeline (Foundational)
goals.description: Research and prototype 2-3 income sources suitable for an autonomous AI system (YouTube automation, API services, tool SaaS, consulting automation). Build proof-of-concept for fastest path to revenue to fund hardware upgrades. Target: First $500/month within 12 weeks.

goals.title: Implement Autonomous Goal Executor
goals.description: Build 6 interconnected tools for autonomous goal management: stall detection, milestone decomposition, weekly scheduling, execution engine, progress reporting, and self-learning loop. Enables the agent to independently track and advance goals without constant user input.

milestones.title: Build six autonomous goal management tools

progress_notes.note: Goal 1 COMPLETE: All 6 tools built, registered in backend/agent_tools/generated/, and system tested. Functions: goal_stall_detector, milestone_decomposer, weekly_scheduler, goal_execution_engine, progress_reporter, self_learning_loop. All async functions verified working with test data.

goals.title: Autonomous Background Executor
goals.description: Build 4 core tools for autonomous background work: idle period detection, goal prioritization, safe task execution with resource monitoring, and session logging. Enables the agent to work on milestones during user idle time while respecting safety constraints.

milestones.title: Implement idle detection, priority scoring, safety execution, session logging

progress_notes.note: Goal 2 COMPLETE: All 4 tools built, registered in backend/agent_tools/generated/, and system tested. Functions: idle_period_detector, goal_priority_scorer, safety_executor, session_logger. Full integration with Goal 1 verified through system test.
